title: Command Center
subtitle: News, Status & Community at a glance
repair.confirmMessage:
This will create a fresh Wine environment and reinstall the RSI Launcher. Your Star Citizen game data (LIVE, PTU, etc.) will be preserved. The current installation will be kept as a backup until you delete it.

This process takes several minutes.
repair.backupBanner: A repair backup exists at {{path}} ({{size}}). If everything works, you can delete it.
repair.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this repair backup? This cannot be undone.
repair.moveWarning: Could not move Star Citizen game data automatically. Please copy the StarCitizen folder manually from the backup.
repair.tooltip: Creates a fresh Wine environment and reinstalls the RSI Launcher while preserving your game data
